worker_a.role: Create the static HTML structure with all required element IDs, complete CSS styling, and the validation script.
constraints: Must define all element IDs listed in generation_contract.md in index.html
Must not include any JavaScript application logic in index.html
Must include semantic HTML structure for sidebar, chat area, and input area
styles.css must style all listed element IDs and CSS classes
validate_site.js must test all behavioral acceptance criteria from generation_contract.md

worker_b.role: Create the application logic (app.js) and Ollama API communication layer (ollama.js) with full conversation history support.
constraints: Must reference static container elements by their IDs from index.html
Must not redefine or duplicate the static page structure from index.html
Dynamic DOM element creation for message bubbles and sidebar items is required and expected
Must send full conversation message history to Ollama on each request for multi-turn context
sendChatRequest must accept a messages array parameter with the full conversation history
Must use Ollama /api/chat endpoint at http://localhost:11434 with stream: false
